records.ety: [F. ressource, fr. OF. ressourdre, resourdre, to spring forth or up again; pref. re- re- + sourdre to spring forth. See Source.]

defs: That to which one resorts orr on which one depends for supply or support; means of overcoming a difficulty; resort; expedient.
quotes: Threat'nings mixed with prayers, his last resource.

defs: Pecuniary means; funds; money, or any property that can be converted into supplies; available means or capabilities of any kind.
quotes: Scotland by no means escaped the fate ordained for every country which is connected, but not incorporated, with another country of greater resources.
